facts: Writ petition for release of pension benefits wrongfully withheld.
draft:
IN THE HIGH COURT OF [STATE]

WRIT PETITION (CIVIL)

Petitioner: Retired Employee
Versus
Respondent: State / PSU

PETITION UNDER ARTICLE 226 OF THE CONSTITUTION

Most Respectfully Submitted:

1. That the petitioner retired from service on [date] and is entitled to pension and other retiral benefits.
2. That the respondent has wrongfully withheld the pension and other benefits without any justification.
3. That the petitioner has made representations which have not been decided.

PRAYER

(a) Issue a writ of mandamus directing the respondent to release the pension and retiral benefits;
(b) Grant any other relief as this Hon'ble Court may deem fit.

Place:
Date:

Petitioner
